source.section: Part 9 - Radar & Sensors > 5 - JHMCS (Joint Helmet-Mounted Cueing System) > 5.5 - JHMCS Functions

steps.action: Power up the JHMCS by setting HMD Brightness knob to BRT (Bright)
steps.voiced: Set HMD Brightness knob to BRT to power up the JHMCS.

steps.action: Press the A/G Master Mode Button
steps.voiced: Press the A/G Master Mode Button.

steps.action: Press Sensor Control Switch FWD to toggle the TDC (Throttle Designator Controller) priority between the HUD (Heads-Up Display) and the HMD (Helmet-Mounted Display). TDC priority is assigned to the helmet when the aiming reticle appears on the helmet. A center dot on the HUD’s TVV means the priority is assigned to the HUD.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch FWD to toggle TDC priority — aiming reticle on helmet means JHMCS has priority.

steps.action: Move the helmet’s Aiming Reticle on the target you want to designate.
steps.voiced: Slew your head to place the Aiming Reticle on the target.

steps.action: Press the TDC Depress (« Enter ») to designate the target. A designation diamond will appear over the target, while the aiming cross will keep following your helmet.
steps.voiced: Press TDC Depress to designate — confirm designation diamond appears over target.

steps.action: You can slew/move the designation diamond using the TDC left/right/up/down controls.
steps.voiced: Use TDC Left/Right/Up/Down to refine the designation diamond position.

steps.action: To un-designate the target, press the Undesignate button on the stick.
steps.voiced: Press the Undesignate button on the stick to clear the designation.
